chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 572 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 2330/2018 2. For hearing of main case 21.03.2025 Mr. Jawaid Farooqui advocate holds brief for Mr. Ghulam Haider Shaikh, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for respondent Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent Mr. Iqbal Khurram, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Pursuant to last order Mr. Naveed Ellahi, Collector of Customs, East, is present. His presence and assistance is noted and appreciated. It is jointly stated that this petition is squarely covered by the Division Bench judgment of this court reported as 2019 PTD 301, hence, may be disposed of in the same reasons and upon the same terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
